title: senecio parryi
intro: Senecio parryi, also known as Parry's ragwort or Parry's groundsel, is a perennial plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Senecio parryi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
